title: Senior Teacher - CL Educate Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - CL Educate Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the CL Educate Digital Technologies family as a Senior Teacher in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CL Educate Digital Technologies:
CL Educate Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CL Educate Digital Technologies!
